name: Spinach Cottage Cheese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen spinach, (10 ounce) thawed & squeezed dry
2 cups small-curd cottage cheese, low-fat or regular
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw spinach in refrigerator overnight or in microwave oven.
2. After thawing, press most of the liquid out of the spinach.
3. Put cottage cheese in a bowl.
4. Stir in beaten eggs.
5. Add flour, cheese and salt to taste; mix thoroughly.
6. Saute onions in margarine until wilted.
7. Add sauteed onions to the flour mixture.
8. Drop pieces of spinach into the mixture and gently fold them in.
9. Pour mixture into a greased 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. If the spinach is very cold, it will take a little longer to bake.
